package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
	_ "net/http/pprof"
)

// scenario for debug_endpoint_in_production: `net/http/pprof` import or `http.Handle("/debug/pprof/", ...)` registration without access control
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario705Positive() {
	http.Handle("/debug/pprof/", http.DefaultServeMux)
}
